concerns.detail: Inserted text contains personal insults attacking the complainant's character rather than discussing advising practices, including calling them a 'clown' (小丑), accusing them of 'biting randomly' (乱咬人), and sarcastic remarks about finding them 'parents' (爹妈) instead of an advisor.
concerns.excerpt: 小丑🤡一个，大家都不理你不代表你可以一直乱咬人

concerns.detail: Deletion removes substantive commentary about specific advisors in the DM/GNN field and references to a Stanford GNN group AP, which appears to suppress legitimate observations rather than cleanup typos or off-topic content.
concerns.excerpt: DM/GNN这几个老师，全都都枪毙肯定有无辜的，但是隔一个枪毙一个那必定全是漏网之鱼(网友都是人才！)（同意，某stanford gnn组出来的ap也不例外）
